visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a close-up of a pair of hands holding a red mesh bag filled with reddish-brown sweet potatoes. A large Costco Wholesale logo is prominently overlaid at the top. The background is a slightly blurred retail environment with bright warehouse lighting. (2) A woman with long dark hair, wearing a white knitted cardigan and a black inner top, appears in a Costco aisle. She smiles and gestures while holding the bag of sweet potatoes. The background shows various pallets of products and people walking in the distance. (3) The camera focuses on a white price tag hanging from the ceiling, displaying the text '$175'. The lighting is bright and consistent with a supermarket setting. (4) The woman returns to the frame, continuing to talk and move the bag of sweet potatoes. She is positioned in the center of the aisle with tall shelving units filled with boxed produce like pumpkins and potatoes behind her. Yellow and pink text boxes appear as overlays at the bottom. (5) A montage begins showing a kitchen sink where the sweet potatoes are being washed under a stream of water. (6) Several sweet potatoes are shown individually wrapped in silver aluminum foil and placed on a white ceramic plate and a metal wire rack. (7) The foil-wrapped potatoes are placed into a white, vintage-style oven with silver knobs. The oven light is on, illuminating the interior. (8) A close-up shows the oven's temperature and timer knobs being adjusted. (9) The final scene shows a baked sweet potato cut in half on a green plate, revealing a vibrant, steaming yellow-orange interior. The setting is a clean kitchen countertop with a wooden slatted background.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Slogan]: 好市多最便宜. [Slogan]: 省錢!烤地瓜. (2) [Variety]: 他考上了壹大. [Variety]: 我烤上了地瓜. (3) [Subtitle]: 烤地瓜 烤地瓜. [Slogan]: $175. (4) [Subtitle]: 我們前推薦那個冷凍的. [Subtitle]: 很棒 很好吃. [Variety]: 他考上了政大. (5) [Subtitle]: 但是. [Subtitle]: OK我們現在要烤地瓜. [Subtitle]: 因為還是. [Slogan]: 自己烤更便宜. (6) [Subtitle]: 我們來回去烤一下. [Subtitle]: 冷凍的等到. [Slogan]: 夏天電費貴貴的時候再買. (7) [Subtitle]: 冬天電費應該還好. [Slogan]: 我們自己烤. (8) [Slogan]: 一次水洗好. (9) [Slogan]: 包上一層薄薄的鋁箔紙. (10) [Slogan]: 放入烤箱. (11) [Slogan]: 低溫烤25分鐘. (12) [Slogan]: 接下來190度 60分鐘. (13) [Slogan]: 漂亮的烤地瓜烤好囉.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator in foreground, 1 male passer-by in the distance, and 1 female shopper further back.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with long black hair wearing a white textured knitted cardigan over a black top.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The initial scenes are inside a large Costco warehouse with high ceilings, industrial shelving, and rows of produce. The later scenes transition to a modern domestic kitchen featuring a stainless steel sink, a vintage white SMEC oven, and a tiled countertop.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with high-pitched female singing in a rhythmic, playful style over an upbeat electronic dance track with a steady drum machine beat. (2) A female voice enters with high-energy speech, sounding enthusiastic and bright. The background music maintains a constant volume. (3) At the seven-second mark, a male voice briefly interjects with a calm, declarative tone stating 'OK 175 yuan'. (4) The female narrator resumes her high-speed speech, punctuated by expressive intonations. The ambient sound of a large open space is subtly perceptible beneath the music. (5) As the scene transitions to the kitchen, a splashing sound of running water is clearly audible for a second. (6) A crisp, metallic rustling sound of aluminum foil follows, layered with the continued narration and upbeat BGM. (7) A dull percussive thud and mechanical click signify an oven door closing. (8) A sharp, high-frequency 'pop' sound effect is used as a transition before a final bell-like chime occurs as the completed dish is shown. The female narrator's voice maintains a joyful, high-arousal valence throughout.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a lifestyle recommendation and cooking tutorial aimed at budget-conscious shoppers. It starts by highlighting the value of purchasing bulk sweet potatoes at Costco versus pre-packaged frozen versions, then transitions into a clear, step-by-step instructional guide on how to perfectly bake them at home to achieve a professional result.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video features prominent Costco branding, takes place inside the store, and specifically recommends a product and its price point as a 'best deal'.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses high-density text overlays and upbeat music typical of social media trend content to maintain viewer engagement during a utility-focused tutorial.
